featuredCase.title: Developer adoption friction briefing
featuredCase.sourceEvidence: Quickstart completion is improving but setup remains a drop-off point.
featuredCase.baseline: Use this as a fast first pass, then inspect source tension and citation support in the lab before treating the recommendation as shippable.
featuredCase.candidate: Ship the recovery-path copy and trace-backed citation checks before widening the pilot.
featuredCase.evaluatorNote: Comparison uses file-backed artifacts for the same eval case so the before/after story is inspectable.

recommendation.label: Pipeline rehearsal
recommendation.text: This comparison uses Generated baseline and a human-authored Reference target. It validates the eval artifact flow, but not live model quality improvement.
recommendation.warning: Run a generated candidate before using this as improvement evidence.
